28 #ifndef ROSCPP_FILE_LOG_H
29 #define ROSCPP_FILE_LOG_H
30 
31 #include "forwards.h"
32 #include <ros/console.h>
33 #include "common.h"
34 
35 #define ROSCPP_LOG_DEBUG(...) ROS_DEBUG_NAMED("roscpp_internal", __VA_ARGS__)
36 #define ROSCPP_CONN_LOG_DEBUG(...) ROS_DEBUG_NAMED("roscpp_internal.connections", __VA_ARGS__)
37

46  // 20110418 TDS: this appears to be used only by rosout.
